page_content:
LATIN LANGUAGE AND LITERATURE MINOR

Department of Classics http://classics.umd.edu

Program Director: Katherine Wasdin, Ph.D. Director of Undergraduate Studies: Jorge J. Bravo III, Ph.D.

This minor introduces students to the Latin language and enables them to read, in Latin, important works of Latin literature.

Students interested in pursuing this minor should consult with the Program Director or the Director of Undergraduate Studies in the Department of Classics. The minor is valuable both for the intrinsic interest of the subject and for the related skills that contribute to higher scores on the GRE exam. Those who enjoyed Latin in high school are encouraged to continue their studies at Maryland.
